codeReview.summary: The remediation closes the round-1 blocker it was assigned: it identifies the intended pre-mission baseline commit (`c252d0e`), reruns the missing full-workspace `npm run build` there, and records the result in committed scrutiny artifacts with supporting handoff/transcript evidence. I found no blocking gap in the newly captured baseline-build evidence.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `webapp-worker` is still written as a code-change/TDD workflow and does not clearly carve out pure validation-evidence remediations like this one.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/webapp-worker/SKILL.md:29-61` requires reading `validation-contract.md` and `.factory/library/architecture.md`, writing tests first, and following code-oriented CI gates. Worker session `913a35a4-f395-4cac-b0cd-6b8646806bed` instead only read mission/AGENTS/services/synthesis artifacts, edited `.factory/validation/hardening/scrutiny/synthesis.json`, added no tests, and its handoff.skillFeedback explicitly asks for validation-only guidance.

summary: Review passed: the baseline full-workspace `npm run build` evidence gap is closed. Commit `0dee7d4` adds a durable remediation entry in `.factory/validation/hardening/scrutiny/synthesis.json`, and the fix handoff/transcript preserve enough detail to audit that baseline build run.
